name: PLNALTSTOKAP
definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[PLNALTSTOKAP] AS 
SELECT     AMBAR_KODU, STOKSUB_REF AS STOK_REF,VARYANT_REF, SUM(SA_APM) AS SA_APM
FROM         (SELECT     PF.AMBAR_KODU, PH.STOK_REF,PH.VARYANT_REF, (PH.MIKTAR - PH.SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR) * (PH.CARPAN2 / PH.CARPAN1) AS X, SA.STOKSUB_REF, 
                                              (SA.MIKTAR * (PH.MIKTAR - PH.SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR)) * (PH.CARPAN2 / PH.CARPAN1) AS SA_APM
                       FROM          dbo.PLANLAMAFISLERI AS PF WITH(NOLOCK) INNER JOIN
                                              dbo.PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI AS PH WITH(NOLOCK) ON PF.PB_REF = PH.PB_REF INNER JOIN
                                              dbo.STOKALT AS SA WITH(NOLOCK) ON PH.STOK_REF = SA.STOK_REF AND SA.VARYANT_REF=PH.VARYANT_REF 
                       WHERE      (PH.CSUB = 1) AND (PF.STATUS = 0) AND (PH.STATUS = 0) AND (PH.MIKTAR - PH.SEVKEDILEN_MIKTAR > 0)) AS LIST
GROUP BY STOKSUB_REF,VARYANT_REF, AMBAR_KODU
